name: HoppyFrogERC
report: The vulnerability lies in the token contract’s _transfer logic, which automatically triggers swapTokensForEth during sell transactions to the Uniswap pair when the contract's token balance exceeds _taxSwapThreshold. Because the contract holds a large token balance, this automatic swap causes significant price slippage and temporarily depresses the token price. An attacker exploits this by using a flashloan to sell tokens, triggering the auto-swap, then buying back tokens at the artificially lowered price, repaying the loan, and profiting from the arbitrage—effectively draining value from the protocol and other users.
